rationale: Educ. Code §45.308 merely grants the commissioner rulemaking authority to administer a program under that subchapter. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so raising the exemption does not conflict.
quote: If the commissioner establishes a program under this subchapter, the commissioner shall adopt rules to administer the program.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemption values; no conflict identified.
